result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= date
LINE 5:     AND createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
                            ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH cases_4m AS (
  SELECT id, ownerid, createddate, closeddate
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
    AND createddate < DATE '2023-09-03'
), assignments AS (
  SELECT caseid__c AS caseid,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_changes
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE caseid__c IN (SELECT id FROM cases_4m)
  GROUP BY caseid__c
), non_transferred AS (
  SELECT c.*
  FROM cases_4m c
  LEFT JOIN assignments a ON a.caseid = c.id
  WHERE COALESCE(a.owner_changes,0) <= 1
), handle AS (
  SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM non_transferred
), agent_case_counts AS (
  -- counts cases per agent based on being initial owner or appearing as new owner in history
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS case_count
  FROM (
    SELECT c.id AS case_id, c.ownerid AS agent_id
    FROM cases_4m c
    UNION
    SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id, ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
      AND ch.caseid__c IN (SELECT id FROM cases_4m)
  ) x
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL AND agent_id <> ''
  GROUP BY agent_id
), avg_handle AS (
  SELECT h.agent_id, AVG(h.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM handle h
  GROUP BY h.agent_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id
FROM avg_handle a
JOIN agent_case_counts c ON c.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE c.case_count > 1
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH cases_4m AS (
  SELECT id, ownerid, createddate, closeddate
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
    AND createddate < DATE '2023-09-03'
), assignments AS (
  SELECT caseid__c AS caseid,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_changes
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE caseid__c IN (SELECT id FROM cases_4m)
  GROUP BY caseid__c
), non_transferred AS (
  SELECT c.*
  FROM cases_4m c
  LEFT JOIN assignments a ON a.caseid = c.id
  WHERE COALESCE(a.owner_changes,0) <= 1
), handle AS (
  SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM non_transferred
), agent_case_counts AS (
  -- counts cases per agent based on being initial owner or appearing as new owner in history
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS case_count
  FROM (
    SELECT c.id AS case_id, c.ownerid AS agent_id
    FROM cases_4m c
    UNION
    SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id, ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
      AND ch.caseid__c IN (SELECT id FROM cases_4m)
  ) x
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL AND agent_id <> ''
  GROUP BY agent_id
), avg_handle AS (
  SELECT h.agent_id, AVG(h.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM handle h
  GROUP BY h.agent_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id
FROM avg_handle a
JOIN agent_case_counts c ON c.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE c.case_count > 1
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

WITH cases_4m AS (
  SELECT id, ownerid, createddate, closeddate
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
    AND createddate < DATE '2023-09-03'
), assignments AS (
  SELECT caseid__c AS caseid,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_changes
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE caseid__c IN (SELECT id FROM cases_4m)
  GROUP BY caseid__c
), non_transferred AS (
  SELECT c.*
  FROM cases_4m c
  LEFT JOIN assignments a ON a.caseid = c.id
  WHERE COALESCE(a.owner_changes,0) <= 1
), handle AS (
  SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM non_transferred
), agent_case_counts AS (
  -- counts cases per agent based on being initial owner or appearing as new owner in history
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS case_count
  FROM (
    SELECT c.id AS case_id, c.ownerid AS agent_id

    FROM casehistory__c ch
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
      AND ch.caseid__c IN (SELECT id FROM cases_4m)
  ) x
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL AND agent_id <> ''
  GROUP BY agent_id
), avg_handle AS (
  SELECT h.agent_id, AVG(h.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM handle h
  GROUP BY h.agent_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id
FROM avg_handle a
JOIN agent_case_counts c ON c.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE c.case_count > 1
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH cases_4m AS (
  SELECT id, ownerid, createddate::timestamp AS created_ts, closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate::date >= DATE '2023-05-02'
    AND createddate::date < DATE '2023-09-03'
), assignments AS (
  SELECT caseid__c AS caseid,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_changes
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE caseid__c IN (SELECT id FROM cases_4m)
  GROUP BY caseid__c
), non_transferred AS (
  SELECT c.id, c.ownerid, c.created_ts, c.closed_ts
  FROM cases_4m c
  LEFT JOIN assignments a ON a.caseid = c.id
  WHERE COALESCE(a.owner_changes,0) <= 1
), handle AS (
  SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_ts - created_ts)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM non_transferred
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS case_count
  FROM (
    SELECT c.id AS case_id, c.ownerid AS agent_id
    FROM cases_4m c
    UNION
    SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id, ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
      AND ch.caseid__c IN (SELECT id FROM cases_4m)
  ) x
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL AND agent_id <> ''
  GROUP BY agent_id
), avg_handle AS (
  SELECT h.agent_id, AVG(h.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM handle h
  GROUP BY h.agent_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id
FROM avg_handle a
JOIN agent_case_counts c ON c.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE c.case_count > 1
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH cases_4m AS (
  SELECT id
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate::date >= DATE '2023-05-02'
    AND createddate::date < DATE '2023-09-03'
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n_cases,
       MIN(createddate) AS min_created,
       MAX(createddate) AS max_created
FROM "Case"
WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM cases_4m);

exec_args.sql:
WITH cases_4m AS (
  SELECT id
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate::date >= DATE '2023-05-02'
    AND createddate::date < DATE '2023-09-03'
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n_cases,
       MIN(createddate) AS min_created,
       MAX(createddate) AS max_created
FROM "Case"
WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM cases_4m);

args.query:
WITH cases_4m AS (
  SELECT id
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate::date >= DATE '2023-05-02'
    AND createddate::date < DATE '2023-09-03'
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS case_count
  FROM (
    SELECT c.id AS case_id, c.ownerid AS agent_id
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.id IN (SELECT id FROM cases_4m)
    UNION
    SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id, ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
      AND ch.caseid__c IN (SELECT id FROM cases_4m)
  ) x
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL AND agent_id <> ''
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT * FROM agent_case_counts ORDER BY case_count DESC;
